name: No-Bake Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the walnuts and almonds finely in a food processor and set aside.
2. Process the dates until they form a paste. Add the ground nuts and blend until the mixture forms a ball.
3. Press this mixture evenly on the bottom of a lightly oiled 8-inch pie pan. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
4. Toss the strawberries with maple syrup.
5. Spoon the strawberry mixture into the pie crust. Cover with waxed paper and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
